semantics: The JSC module-loader registry is no longer a JavaScript Map, so snapshot and restore are unsupported.
The get export always returns null and does not inspect its global argument.
The reset export always returns false and does not inspect either argument.
Null, stale-looking, and live arguments therefore have identical inert behavior.
Neither export changes the VM's pending exception or module-loader state.
Pinned upstream documents that both symbols have no callers and remain only for ABI compatibility.
The Home and Bun profile libraries compile, link, and run one external consumer against both exports.
